      Replaces any bound logical variables in t with schema variables (necessary for proof saving/loading, if t occurs as part of a taclet).

      • createAxiomGoalTemplate

        private TacletGoalTemplate createAxiomGoalTemplate(Term goalTerm)

      • generateAxiomTaclet

        public Taclet generateAxiomTaclet(Name tacletName,
                         Term originalAxiom,
                         ImmutableList<ProgramVariable> programVars,
                         KeYJavaType kjt,
                         RuleSet ruleSet,
                         TermServices services)
        Returns a no-find taclet to the passed axiom. If the axiom expression does not contain reference to self, it is considered as if it were static.
